IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: ACHIEVING REGIONAL HEALTH THROUGH HIGH QUALITY COMPREHENSIVE CARE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE MISSION OF WELLSPACE HEALTH IS ACHIEVING REGIONAL HEALTH THROUGH HIGH QUALITY COMPREHENSIVE CARE.
IRS990.Desc: WELLSPACE HEALTH, A NONPROFIT FEDERALLY QUALIFIED HEALTH CENTER (FQHC), IS COMMITTED TO ENHANCING REGIONAL HEALTH BY DELIVERING HIGH-QUALITY, COMPREHENSIVE CARE. IN 2024, WELLSPACE REACHED AROUND 125,000 INDIVIDUALS THROUGH OVER 400,000 MEDICAL, DENTAL, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, AND SUPPORTIVE SERVICE ENCOUNTERS. FOCUSED ON SERVING THE UNDERSERVED IN THE SACRAMENTO REGION, 92% OF ITS PATIENTS ARE CLASSIFIED AS LOW-INCOME, WITH 10% UNINSURED AND 6,200 EXPERIENCING HOMELESSNESS.WELLSPACE PROVIDES SERVICES DAILY TO 1,400 INDIVIDUALS VIA AN INTEGRATED NETWORK OF FEDERALLY QUALIFIED HEALTH CENTERS, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTERS, AND CALIFORNIA'S SECOND-LARGEST 9-8-8 SUICIDE AND CRISIS CENTER (988 SACRAMENTO), ALONG WITH OTHER COLLABORATIVE PARTNERSHIPS. KEY PROGRAMS INCLUDE WELLSPACE NEXUS, WHICH ENHANCES CARE FOR VULNERABLE POPULATIONS THROUGH INNOVATIVE CARE MODELS AND NETWORK EXPANSION, AND THE WELLSPACE INSTITUTE, WHICH EMPOWERS HISTORICALLY DISENFRANCHISED COMMUNITIES VIA HEALTHCARE WORKFORCE PROGRAMS SUCH AS THE LEAD, MEDICAL ASSISTANT CERTIFICATE, AND COMMUNITY HEALTH WORKER CERTIFICATE PROGRAMS.988 SACRAMENTO, A CRITICAL PART OF THE CRISIS SYSTEM, OFFERS 24/7 SUICIDE PREVENTION AND MENTAL HEALTH CRISIS INTERVENTION, ENSURING ONGOING SUPPORT FOR INDIVIDUALS POST-CRISIS. AS SACRAMENTO COUNTY'S FIRST DESIGNATED CERTIFIED COMMUNITY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER (CCBHC) SINCE 2022, WELLSPACE ADDRESSES COMPLEX MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE NEEDS COMPREHENSIVELY.WELLSPACE MAINTAINS HIGH STANDARDS OF CARE, ACCREDITED BY THE JOINT COMMISSION FOR AMBULATORY CARE AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, AND CERTIFIED AS A PATIENT-CENTERED MEDICAL HOME AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HOME, EMPHASIZING ITS COMMITMENT TO INTEGRATED, PATIENT-CENTERED CARE. THROUGH THESE INITIATIVES, WELLSPACE HEALTH CONTINUES TO ADVANCE ITS MISSION OF ACHIEVING REGIONAL HEALTH THROUGH INTEGRATED, INCLUSIVE, AND COMPASSIONATE CARE, ADAPTING TO MEET THE EVOLVING NEEDS OF THE COMMUNITIES IT SERVES.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART II, LINE 10, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: INSURANCE PAYMENT - 2023 AMOUNT: $ 255,997. MISCELLANEOUS REVENUE - 2023 AMOUNT: $ 407,684.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: WELLSPACE HEALTH ENGAGES LOBBYISTS AND BELONGS TO INDUSTRY AND PROFESSIONAL ASSOCIATIONS FOR WHICH A PORTION OF THE MEMBERSHIP DUES IS USED FOR LOBBYING ACTIVITIES.

ENDOWMENT FUNDING IS RESTRICTED AND CAN BE UTILIZED FOR ANY RELATED ORGANIZATION MISSION. THE ORGANIZATION'S ENDOWED AGENCY FUND IS ADMINISTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE POLICIES OF THE COMMUNITY FOUNDATION.

WELLSPACE IS EXEMPT FROM AND IS NOT SUBJECT TO FEDERAL OR STATE INCOME TAXES, EXCEPT FOR UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE AND SECTION 23701D OF THE CALIFORNIA REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE. NEXUS IS CONSIDERED A DISREGARDED ENTITY AS DEFINED BY THE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE, AND, THEREFORE, TREATED AS A DIVISION OF THE ORGANIZATION FOR FEDERAL TAX PURPOSES. AS OF JUNE 30, 2024 AND 2023, THE ORGANIZATION HAD NO UNRECOGNIZED TAX POSITIONS OR UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS REQUIRING ACCRUAL. UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME TAX, IF ANY, IS INSIGNIFICANT. NO PROVISION FOR INCOME TAXES HAS BEEN PROVIDED IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.
A. JONATHAN PORTEUS RECEIVED AN AUTO ALLOWANCE. THIS WAS INCLUDED IN TAXABLE INCOME.
A. JONATHAN PORTEUS RECEIVED A ONE-TIME BONUS PAYMENT FOR FISCAL YEAR 2022 AND 2023 BASED ON AN ASSESSMENT OF HIS PERFORMANCE.
THE NUMBER IN PART I, COLUMN (B) REPRESENTS THE NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE AUDIT COMMITTEE REVIEWS THE FORM 990 PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL OFFICERS AND BOARD OF DIRECTOR MEMBERS ARE REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A DISCLOSURE FORM ANNUALLY, WHICH AFFIRMS THEIR ACCEPTANCE OF THE TERMS OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND THE REQUIREMENT TO DISCLOSE ANY EXISTING OR POTENTIAL CONFLICT. DISCLOSURES SHOULD BE MADE TO THE CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER (OR IF HE OR SHE IS THE ONE WITH THE CONFLICT, THEN TO THE BOARD CHAIR), WHO SHALL BRING THE MATTER TO THE ATTENTION OF THE BOARD, OR A DULY CONSTITUTED COMMITTEE THEREOF. DISCLOSURE INVOLVING DIRECTORS SHOULD BE MADE TO THE BOARD CHAIR, (OR IF HE OR SHE IS THE ONE WITH THE CONFLICT, THEN TO THE BOARD VICE-CHAIR) WHO SHALL BRING THESE MATTERS TO THE BOARD, OR A DULY CONSTITUTED COMMITTEE THEREOF. THE BOARD, OR A DULY CONSTITUTED COMMITTEE THEREOF, SHALL DETERMINE WHETHER A CONFLICT EXISTS AND IN THE CASE OF AN EXISTING CONFLICT, WHETHER THE CONTEMPLATED TRANSACTION MAY BE AUTHORIZED AS JUST, FAIR, AND REASONABLE. THE DECISION OF THE BOARD, OR A DULY CONSTITUTED COMMITTEE THEREOF, ON THESE MATTERS WILL REST IN THEIR SOLE DISCRETION, AND THEIR CONCERN MUST BE THE WELFARE OF THE ORGANIZATION AND THE ADVANCEMENT OF ITS PURPOSE. TRANSACTIONS WITH PARTIES WITH WHOM A CONFLICTING INTEREST EXISTS MAY BE UNDERTAKEN ONLY IF ALL OF THE FOLLOWING ARE OBSERVED: I. THE CONFLICTING INTEREST IS FULLY DISCLOSED; II. THE PERSON WITH THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST IS EXCLUDED FROM THE DISCUSSION AND APPROVAL OF SUCH TRANSACTION; III. A COMPETITIVE BID OR COMPARABLE VALUATION EXISTS; AND IV. THE BOARD, OR A DULY CONSTITUTED COMMITTEE THEREOF, HAS DETERMINED THAT THE TRANSACTION IS IN THE BEST INTEREST OF THE ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: WELLSPACE HEALTH USES LABOR MARKET DATA AND MARKET COMPARISONS OF OTHER REGIONAL NON-PROFITS TO DETERMINE COMPENSATION OF THE CEO, OFFICERS, AND KEY EMPLOYEES. WELLSPACE HEALTH ALSO USES THE PRIVATE MARKET, BASED ON EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS. THE BOARD OF WELLSPACE HEALTH APPROVES THE COMPENSATION FOR THE CEO. THE CEO APPROVES COMPENSATION FOR ALL OTHER OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES. DELIBERATION AND DECISION FOR THE COMPENSATION WAS DOCUMENTED IN THE BOARD APPROVED BUDGET. MARKET COMPARABILITY WAS LAST UNDERTAKEN IN 2023, BUT OTHER PARTS OF THE PROCESS ARE DONE ANNUALLY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST AT THE ORGANIZATION'S OFFICE.

IdDisregardedEntitiesGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: HEALTHCARE, WSN IS A RISK BEARING ORGANIZATION (RBO)
